title: paeonia mascula var. triternata
intro: Paeonia mascula var. triternata, also known as the Himalayan peony, is a subspecies of the peony plant native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Paeonia mascula var. triternata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
